title: Platform Overview
content: This platform is an AI-powered English learning system offering structured courses from A1 to C2 based on CEFR standards. It includes courses, exams, progress tracking, and instructor support.

title: User Account Policy
content: Users must register with a valid email address. Each user is allowed one account only. Sharing accounts or credentials is strictly prohibited.

title: Privacy Policy
content: User data is stored securely and encrypted. Personal information is never sold or shared with third parties except when required by law.

title: Security Guidelines
content: Users should use strong passwords and avoid sharing login credentials. Suspicious activity may lead to temporary account suspension.

title: Community Guidelines
content: Respectful communication is required. Harassment, spam, or offensive behavior will result in account restrictions.

title: Course Structure Overview
content: Each CEFR level (A1-C2) contains four skill courses: Reading, Writing, Listening, and Speaking.

title: Learning Path Rules
content: Students must complete all four skill courses in a level before progressing to the next level.

title: Reading Course Description
content: Reading courses focus on comprehension, vocabulary expansion, inference, and understanding written texts in different contexts.

title: Writing Course Description
content: Writing courses develop grammar accuracy, sentence structure, paragraph writing, essay writing, and formal communication skills.

title: Listening Course Description
content: Listening courses train learners to understand spoken English in conversations, lectures, and real-life situations.

title: Speaking Course Description
content: Speaking courses focus on fluency, pronunciation, vocabulary usage, and interactive communication.

title: A1 Level Description
content: Beginner level where learners understand and use basic everyday expressions and simple sentences.

title: A2 Level Description
content: Elementary level where learners can communicate simple tasks and routine information.

title: B1 Level Description
content: Intermediate level where learners can handle everyday situations and express opinions on familiar topics.

title: B2 Level Description
content: Upper-intermediate level where learners can interact fluently and produce detailed written and spoken content.

title: C1 Level Description
content: Advanced level where learners can understand complex texts and express ideas fluently and precisely.

title: C2 Level Description
content: Proficiency level where learners can understand virtually everything and express themselves naturally like native speakers.

title: Exam Overview
content: Each level includes a final exam evaluating all four skills: reading, writing, listening, and speaking.

title: Exam Passing Criteria
content: Students must achieve at least 70 percent to pass the level exam.

title: Exam Retake Policy
content: Students may retake a failed exam after a waiting period of 14 days.

title: Exam Structure Details
content: Exams include multiple choice questions, writing tasks, listening comprehension, and oral evaluation.

title: Grading System
content: Grades are calculated from exams, quizzes, assignments, and participation activities.

title: Certification Policy
content: Certificates are awarded after completing all courses and passing the final exam.

title: Refund Policy
content: Refunds are available within 14 days if less than 20 percent of course content has been accessed.

title: Payment Policy
content: All courses must be paid before full access is granted.

title: Subscription Model
content: Users can subscribe monthly or annually to access platform content.

title: Instructor Responsibilities
content: Instructors must provide accurate educational content and respond to student questions professionally.

title: Instructor Communication Rules
content: All communication must be done through official platform channels.

title: Instructor Evaluation Policy
content: Instructor performance is evaluated based on student feedback and engagement metrics.

title: Instructor Content Guidelines
content: Instructors must ensure content aligns with CEFR standards and platform curriculum.

title: Student Guidelines
content: Students must complete lessons in order and respect platform rules.

title: Student Study Recommendations
content: Students are encouraged to study daily and revise previous lessons regularly.

title: Attendance Policy
content: Consistent participation improves learning outcomes and retention.

title: Learning Analytics
content: The platform tracks student progress across all four skills to provide personalized recommendations.

title: Progress Tracking System
content: Student progress is measured by completed lessons, quiz scores, and exam results.

title: Technical Support Policy
content: Users can contact support for login issues, payment problems, or technical bugs.

title: Platform Availability
content: The platform is available 24/7 except during maintenance periods.

title: Mobile Access Policy
content: The platform supports mobile, tablet, and desktop devices.

title: Content Protection Policy
content: All course materials are protected and cannot be redistributed.

title: Anti-Cheating Policy
content: Cheating during exams or quizzes will result in penalties or account suspension.

title: Lesson Format
content: Lessons include video content, quizzes, and practice exercises.

title: Exercise System
content: Each lesson includes interactive exercises to reinforce learning.

title: Adaptive Learning System
content: The platform adapts content difficulty based on student performance.

title: Recommendation Engine
content: The system recommends lessons based on student weaknesses and progress.

title: Course Completion Rules
content: A course is marked complete when all lessons and assessments are finished.

title: Skill Balance Policy
content: Students are encouraged to balance all four skills equally.

title: Vocabulary Development Policy
content: Vocabulary is introduced progressively across all levels.

title: Grammar Learning Policy
content: Grammar is taught from simple structures in A1 to complex forms in C2.

title: Speaking Practice Policy
content: Speaking practice includes pronunciation exercises and conversation simulations.

title: Listening Practice Policy
content: Listening exercises include real-life conversations and academic lectures.

title: Writing Practice Policy
content: Writing tasks include essays, summaries, and structured paragraphs.

title: Reading Practice Policy
content: Reading exercises include articles, stories, and comprehension tests.
